  Value *RetVal = RI.getReturnValue();

  KnownFPClass KnownClass;
  Value *Simplified =
      SimplifyDemandedUseFPClass(RetVal, ~ReturnClass, KnownClass, 0, &RI);
  if (!Simplified)
    return nullptr;

  return ReturnInst::Create(RI.getContext(), Simplified);
}
